title: Return clone rather than return Err(e.clone())
description:
lichen-tui/src/main.rs:147 returns:
```rust
return Err(e.clone());
```

If the error type is Clone but the original `e` is owned, the clone is unnecessary. Check if `e` can be returned directly without cloning.
close_reason: Changed poll_node() to use is_err() check and unwrap_err() to return owned error instead of cloning
